metadata.project: Full Steam Ahead — Practice Exam Cover Images
metadata.notes: Practice exam covers match the established series style exactly. No heading or subheading text block. Single exam label text placed opposite the operator character. See operator_side per image.

style_constants.background: Dark navy-blue industrial scene, deep charcoal and navy tones (#0d1f35 to #1a3a5c), subtle blueprint grid lines visible across the entire image, dramatic cinematic industrial lighting
style_constants.operator_attire: Dark navy/charcoal full-length coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis panels on shoulders and chest, silver reflective safety tape stripes on arms and torso, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, professional appearance.
style_constants.exam_label_style: CRITICAL TYPOGRAPHY SIZING RULE: Both text lines must be the same visual weight and nearly identical font size — treat them as a matched pair. Line 1 (paper code, e.g. '2A1') in solid white. Line 2 ('PRACTICE EXAM') in bright orange (#E8590C). Each line is approximately 15-18% of the total image height tall. The two lines together span roughly 35-40% of the image height. Both lines use the same bold condensed sans-serif uppercase font, same point size. Do NOT make the paper code dramatically larger than 'PRACTICE EXAM' — they should look like a balanced two-line unit. No subtitle or topics line.
style_constants.hologram_style: Blueprint-style cyan and white technical engineering diagrams floating as semi-transparent holographic overlays in the mid-ground, glowing faintly
style_constants.icon_strip: Bottom 18% of image: dark navy rounded rectangular panel with 4 evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange (#E8590C) and white line-art style on dark background
style_constants.overall_quality: Photorealistic, cinematic, 4K quality, dramatic depth of field with background slightly defocused, warm amber/orange industrial glow from operating equipment, professional color grading

images.prompt:
Photorealistic cinematic practice exam cover image for a professional Canadian power engineering exam prep course. 16:9 landscape format.

BACKGROUND (left 55%): Large industrial boiler plant scene — pressure vessels, steam drums, flanged pipe headers, and safety valves in an industrial power plant. Warm amber and orange glow from active boilers. Slightly defocused for depth. Dark navy and charcoal tones with subtle blueprint grid lines overlaid across the full image. Semi-transparent holographic overlays floating in mid-ground: ASME code section diagrams, pressure vessel cross-section schematics — glowing cyan and white blueprint style.

OPERATOR (right 40%): A male power engineer standing on the RIGHT side of the frame, facing left toward the equipment. He holds a tablet and reviews data with a focused, professional expression. He wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, mid-30s, professional.

TEXT OVERLAID ON IMAGE — LEFT SIDE (vertically centered in the left 45% of the frame, NOT at the top): Exactly two lines of text, treated as a matched pair of equal visual weight.
- Line 1: '2A1' — bold condensed sans-serif uppercase, solid white, approximately 11% of image height tall
- Line 2: 'PRACTICE EXAM' — same bold condensed sans-serif uppercase font, same point size as Line 1, bright orange (#E8590C), approximately 11% of image height tall
The two lines are tightly stacked with minimal gap. Together they occupy roughly 25% of the image height. IMPORTANT: both lines must be the same size — do not make '2A1' larger than 'PRACTICE EXAM'. The text block should feel proportionate and balanced relative to the overall image — not oversized or dominating. No subtitle, no topics line, no other text anywhere on the image.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) Pressure vessel cross-section with nozzle, (2) ASME code book symbol, (3) Stress/force diagram with arrows, (4) Torque wrench or bolt assembly.

Overall: Dramatic cinematic depth of field, warm industrial amber lighting, professional color grading, dark navy and charcoal palette with orange accents. Photorealistic 4K quality.

Photorealistic cinematic practice exam cover image for a professional Canadian power engineering exam prep course. 16:9 landscape format.

BACKGROUND (left 55%): A large industrial heat exchanger network — shell-and-tube exchangers, pressure vessels, and steam headers stretching into the distance inside a power plant. Warm amber and orange glow from active steam flow. Slightly defocused for depth. Dark navy and charcoal tones with subtle blueprint grid lines overlaid across the full image. Semi-transparent holographic overlays floating in mid-ground: a Temperature-entropy (T-s) diagram showing the Rankine cycle, and a heat exchanger schematic — glowing cyan and white blueprint style.

OPERATOR (right 40%): A female power engineer standing on the RIGHT side of the frame, facing left toward the equipment. Arms crossed, professional smile. She wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, mid-30s, authoritative.

- Line 2: 'PRACTICE EXAM' — same bold condensed sans-serif uppercase font, same point size as Line 1, bright orange (#E8590C), approximately 17% of image height tall
The two lines are tightly stacked with minimal gap. Together they occupy roughly 38% of the image height. IMPORTANT: both lines must be the same size — do not make '2A2' larger than 'PRACTICE EXAM'. No subtitle, no topics line, no other text anywhere on the image.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) Bell curve / Carnot efficiency graph, (2) Crucible pouring molten metal, (3) Crystal lattice / atomic structure, (4) Tensile test specimen with stress-strain curve.

Overall: Dramatic cinematic depth of field, warm industrial amber lighting, professional color grading, dark navy and charcoal palette with orange accents. Photorealistic 4K quality.

He wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, mid-40s, experienced.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) Fire-tube boiler schematic cross-section with tubes visible, (2) Centrifugal pump cutaway showing impeller, (3) Water droplet with filter media column, (4) Ion exchange / water softener column schematic.

Photorealistic cinematic practice exam cover image for a professional Canadian power engineering exam prep course. 16:9 landscape format.

BACKGROUND (left 55%): A large industrial reciprocating steam engine — exposed pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft, and flywheel visible with dramatic mechanical detail. Industrial piping manifolds, flanged connections, and valve assemblies in the background. Warm amber and orange glow from the running machinery. Slightly defocused. Dark navy and charcoal tones with subtle blueprint grid lines overlaid across the full image. Semi-transparent holographic overlays floating in mid-ground: a Pressure-Volume (P-V) indicator diagram for an engine cycle, and an isometric piping schematic — glowing cyan and white blueprint style.

OPERATOR (right 40%): A female power engineer standing on the RIGHT side of the frame, facing left toward the machinery. She wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, late 20s to mid-30s, engaged and professional.

TEXT OVERLAID ON IMAGE — LEFT SIDE (vertically centered in the left 45% of the frame, NOT at the top): Exactly two lines of text, treated as a matched pair of equal visual weight.
- Line 1: '2B1' only — bold condensed sans-serif uppercase, solid white, approximately 11% of image height tall. No dash, no hyphen, no punctuation after '2B1'.
- Line 2: 'PRACTICE EXAM' — same bold condensed sans-serif uppercase font, same point size as Line 1, bright orange (#E8590C), approximately 11% of image height tall
The two lines are tightly stacked with minimal gap. Together they occupy roughly 25% of the image height. IMPORTANT: both lines must be the same size. Line 1 is just the code '2B1' with nothing else on that line. No subtitle, no topics line, no other text anywhere on the image.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) Piston-cylinder engine cross-section with connecting rod, (2) Oil lubrication circuit schematic with pump and filter, (3) Isometric pipe elbow and flange fitting, (4) Orthographic three-view engineering drawing symbol.

Overall: Dramatic cinematic depth of field, warm industrial amber lighting from machinery, professional color grading, dark navy and charcoal palette with orange accents. Photorealistic 4K quality.

He wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, mid-40s to early 50s, confident.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) PID controller feedback loop diagram, (2) Flame / combustion burner schematic, (3) Plant process flow block diagram, (4) Leaf or recycling arrows symbol representing environmental compliance.

Photorealistic cinematic practice exam cover image for a professional Canadian power engineering exam prep course. 16:9 landscape format.

BACKGROUND (right 55%): A large industrial air compressor unit — reciprocating or screw type, with intercooler vessels, pressure piping, and safety valves — alongside high-voltage electrical switchgear panels with glowing indicator lights. Cool blue-white electrical glow mixed with warm amber from the compressor. Slightly defocused for depth. Dark navy and charcoal tones with subtle blueprint grid lines overlaid across the full image. Semi-transparent holographic overlays floating in mid-ground: a refrigeration cycle pressure-enthalpy (P-h) diagram, and a three-phase electrical sine wave diagram — glowing cyan and white blueprint style.

OPERATOR (left 40%): A female power engineer standing on the LEFT side of the frame, facing right toward the electrical panel. She holds a digital multimeter, probing a terminal on an electrical panel with focused professional attention. She wears: dark navy/charcoal coverall worksuit with bright orange hi-vis shoulder and chest panels, silver reflective safety tape stripes, dark hard hat, clear safety glasses. Photorealistic, early 30s, focused.

TEXT OVERLAID ON IMAGE — RIGHT SIDE (vertically centered in the right 45% of the frame, NOT at the top): Exactly two lines of text, treated as a matched pair of equal visual weight.
- Line 1: '2B3' — bold condensed sans-serif uppercase, solid white, approximately 17% of image height tall
- Line 2: 'PRACTICE EXAM' — same bold condensed sans-serif uppercase font, same point size as Line 1, bright orange (#E8590C), approximately 17% of image height tall
The two lines are tightly stacked with minimal gap. Together they occupy roughly 38% of the image height. IMPORTANT: both lines must be the same size — do not make '2B3' larger than 'PRACTICE EXAM'. No subtitle, no topics line, no other text anywhere on the image.

BOTTOM ICON STRIP: Dark navy rounded panel across the bottom 18% of image. Four evenly-spaced small technical illustrations in orange and white line-art: (1) Three-phase induction motor cross-section diagram, (2) Reciprocating compressor cross-section showing piston and valves, (3) Refrigeration cycle schematic with compressor-condenser-expansion valve-evaporator loop, (4) Three-phase AC sine waves (R-Y-B).

Overall: Dramatic cinematic depth of field, cool blue-white electrical glow mixed with warm amber, professional color grading, dark navy and charcoal palette with orange accents. Photorealistic 4K quality.
